programme.title: The Great Day Out
programme.desc: Karni takes to the skies above the Gold Coast. Jess discovers what is now inside the Old Redcliffe Fire Station, while Katrina Blowers from 7NEWS shares what she does in her downtime.

programme.title: Farmer Wants a Wife
programme.desc: Our farmers' families come to lunch and discover they must choose one lady to send on a crucial 24-hour date. Who will win an entire day and night with their farmer?

programme.title: Rebel Wilson's Pooch Perfect
programme.desc: The stylists continue to tackle more challenges and attempt to wow the judges. Watch as these pups are transformed from ordinary to extraordinary.

programme.title: Rebel Wilson's Pooch Perfect
programme.desc: You're invited to the fanciest pooch party in town. The groomers are challenged to show grace and class as they transform the pets into posh pooches.

programme.title: Jabba's Movies
programme.desc: Jabba presents his best movies to see in Autumn featuring Michael, The Devil Wears Prada 2, The Sheep Detectives, Star Wars: The Mandalorian & Grogu, plus previews the hottest flicks coming in Winter.

programme.title: My Reno Rules
programme.desc: Self-made billionaire Adrian Portelli has bought two Melbourne houses, to be renovated into showstopping homes by four keen teams. Two lucky Australian families will win the completed luxury homes.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A fire at Ben's hardware store causes a major setback for the family; Becky feels enormous pressure to help every single patient at her mental health facility internship.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dan achieves a major financial milestone, making him reconsider his belief in the Conners curse; Mark finds out some news that causes him to reevaluate his future.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Boris the Staffy was born with a cleft palate. Lucky to survive, he has now endured seven operations to try to fix the gaping hole in his mouth. All have failed and time is running out. Chronic infections are now destroying his quality of life. Like Boris, his owner Jess is refusing to give up. She's written to Chris looking for one last chance. The surgery will be the first of its type ever performed in Australia.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: West Highland terrier, Chester lives in Bondi but has a fanatical hatred of skateboarders. It's a dangerous combination and one that is making life hell for his owners. They're worried Chester could bite someone and end up in serious trouble. What can Dr Chris come up with to tame the savage terrier?

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Welcome to the courtroom of Judge Judith Sheindlin. The cases are real, the people are real, and the rulings are final.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Welcome to the courtroom of Judge Judith Sheindlin. The cases are real, the people are real, and the rulings are final.

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The mother (Jennifer Grey) of a newborn with breathing difficulties and liver failure must make a very difficult decision that could affect her own health as well as her baby's. Meanwhile, Cuddy (Lisa Edelstein) tells House (Hugh Laurie) to hire a woman for his team, and he delegates the task to Foreman (Omar Epps) and Taub (Peter Jacobson). Cuddy also asks House to babysit her daughter and he and Wilson (Robert Sean Leonard) learn a parenting lesson in the process.

programme.title: House
programme.desc: House (Hugh Laurie) finally hires a female member of the team, a third-year medical student (Amber Tamblyn) who, it turns out, has a tie to Taub (Peter Jacobson). Meanwhile, a senatorial candidate's campaign manager (Jack Coleman) suddenly falls ill, and the team must look to the candidate (Pat Finn) for clues about his condition.

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A girl is suspected of having smallpox after a 200-year-old medicine jar found in a shipwreck shatters in her hand, so a CDC doctor (Dylan Baker) locks down the hospital. Martha Masters (Amber Tamblyn) questions his motive for doing so. Meanwhile, Wilson (Robert Sean Leonard) and Sam (Cynthia Watros) examine their relationship after they comfort a 6-year-old cancer patient (Devon Woods).

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The body of a petty officer falls from a ceiling at a nightclub; Ducky says that someone dressed him after he died. Gibbs finds $40K in the victim's room, and the team follows the money.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: When a sailor dies in an underground street race, the team determines that his car, which contained confidential Navy equipment, had been sabotaged.

programme.title: The Finder
programme.desc: Walter is asked by a young girl, for help in finding her recently disappeared father. Initially uninterested, Walter takes on the case when he discovers the man had been talking with someone else just moments after calling his family. Meanwhile, Leo is depressed as the birthday of his daughter arrives, and he, once again, contemplates his desire for revenge.

programme.title: The Finder
programme.desc: Isabel's friend Joyce asks Walter to find the men who murdered her father, a racetrack aficionado. With the help of some horse-whispering, Walter discovers links to an inheritance Joyce was supposed to receive from her father, and to some mysterious men at the track whom Walter suspects are involved in her father's death. Meanwhile, Willa decides that she wants to apply for college.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: Alexander Grayson becomes drawn to a woman who looks like his dead former love, while her fiance, Harker, worries about his ability to give her the life she deserves.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: Grayson and Lady Jayne become lovers as he looks into her connections; Grayson helps Mina face a challenge; Jonathan strikes a bargain that has unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Day Break
programme.desc: Take a bad day and multiply it by infinity. Detective Brett Hopper is having a hellacious day, the kind of day where nothing goes his way and he just can't wait to put it behind him. The problem is he can't, because he's living the same day over and over again.

programme.title: Dream Academy
programme.desc: A rare insight into the highs and lows of life as a start-up entrepreneur. This documentary series follows a group of fledgling businesses as they strive to make their first million.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A children's game show that tests, not only mental, but physical skills of the contestants. Two teams gather minutes by answering questions correctly, and then it's a race to fit together a sequence of connective tubing within the time frame racked up from the questions. If a team has more minutes, they've got a better chance of completing the build. The stakes are high, as the losing team face getting slimed by the winners.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: The Great Day Out
programme.desc: Karni has lift off at iFLY Gold Coast. We meet the man behind the most popular Ekka attraction, while Alastair is on a Moreton Bay food trail.

programme.title: Farmer Wants a Wife
programme.desc: It's the last 24 hour dates with the ladies chosen by the farmers' families. It signals the last chance to firm up relationships before the final two decisions are made.

programme.title: Rebel Wilson's Pooch Perfect
programme.desc: This episode is all about celebrity. Pooches will be scoring Hollywood makeovers as stylists create the hottest celebrity inspired lookalikes in town. Hosted by Rebel Wilson.

programme.title: Rebel Wilson's Pooch Perfect
programme.desc: Fairy tales spark creativity and inspiration as we transport the competitors into another world. In this challenge, stylists will need to give us their best prince, princess or possibly a pumpkin.

programme.title: The Intolerant Cooks
programme.sub-title: Yummy, Yummy, Yummy I Got Curry In My Tummy!
programme.desc: Join witty food intolerants as they create delicious recipes using fresh regional produce for those with food sensitivities.

programme.title: Extended Family
programme.sub-title: The Consequences of Loaning Your Dad Money
programme.desc: Jim advises a player on the Celtics to take one of his recent losses less personally, sparking a controversy that forces the Kearney clan to confront their spiritual beliefs.

programme.title: Grand Crew
programme.desc: Noah tries to find a new normal with Simone. Anthony realises he doesn't have a poker face. Sherm starts a risky new business. And there's wine.

programme.title: Lopez Vs. Lopez
programme.desc: When Elsa, George's mother, changes the locks on Mayan and Quinten's house, George enlists the help of his lawyer cousin, who reveals surprising information about Elsa. Mayan and Quinten receive news.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Mark takes on odd jobs, determined to find a way to pay for school; Darlene grapples with her emotions when she discovers her household is about to change dramatically.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A sudden turn of events forces the Conners to face the daily struggles of life in Lanford in a way they never have before.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.sub-title: A Tiger's Visit To The Dentist
programme.desc: At the Mogo Zoo, Saraya the Sumatran tiger is in excruciating pain from a fractured tooth. Chris has done plenty of dental surgeries on cats before but fixing this huge fang is going to be a logistical nightmare. And what if the big cat wakes up during surgery?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: In the middle of the night, Chris is called out to a women's prison to help a mother in trouble. Golden retriever Brielle is giving birth to a huge litter of puppies that are earmarked to become assistance dogs. Assistance Dogs Australia run several prison programs where inmates raise and train their puppies. But this is the first-time inmates have been involved with a birth behind bars. It's going to be a long night and it looks like hard labour for Brielle!

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Welcome to the courtroom of Judge Judith Sheindlin. The cases are real, the people are real, and the rulings are final.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Welcome to the courtroom of Judge Judith Sheindlin. The cases are real, the people are real, and the rulings are final.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits failing restaurants across the USA in an attempt to revive their businesses. He and his team access the damage and help the owners get back into business.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits a Cuban cafe in Brooklyn. Owners Marcelo and Kata used to be married to each other but now fight over everything, and their bickering is driving customers away.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay steps in to save a small cafe and a couple's engagement.

programme.title: First Dates UK
programme.desc: Veteran house music groover Mark meets Alison - call centre worker by day, raver by night.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Pride suspects that Baitfish has returned, and the NCIS team set out to chase leads in an attempt to locate him.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: After a sailor is killed in a strip club, the murder weapon turns out to be linked to other unsolved cases, and Brody receives a visit from her ex-fiance.

programme.title: The Rising
programme.desc: Fearing her time is limited and with unfinished business, Neve sets out to make amends; her anger grows when her killer is released.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits failing restaurants across the USA in an attempt to revive their businesses. He and his team access the damage and help the owners get back into business.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits a Cuban cafe in Brooklyn. Owners Marcelo and Kata used to be married to each other but now fight over everything, and their bickering is driving customers away.

programme.title: Jordie, Sam & Ted's Adventures
programme.desc: Sam, Jordie and Ted welcome one more to the team as they adventure through Queensland. This week they're exploring Rainbow beach.

programme.title: Jordie, Sam & Ted's Adventures
programme.desc: In this season finale Sam, Jordie and the boys head to Kgari to adventure through the worlds largest sand island.

programme.title: The Girl in the Woods
programme.desc: Carrie squares off against her ruthless former mentor; Nolan wrestles with an unwelcome change; Tasha lands face-to-face with evil itself.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A children's game show that tests, not only mental, but physical skills of the contestants. Two teams gather minutes by answering questions correctly, and then it's a race to fit together a sequence of connective tubing within the time frame racked up from the questions. If a team has more minutes, they've got a better chance of completing the build. The stakes are high, as the losing team face getting slimed by the winners.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: The Great Day Out
programme.desc: Laurel finds a country getaway not far from the city. Kimberley discovers some secrets of inner-city suburbia. Alastair uncovers the must-do dining venues in Ipswich. We visit the popular Blackbutt Bakery.

programme.title: Farmer Wants a Wife
programme.desc: It's the final day of the Farmstays, as our Farmers spend time with their remaining ladies. Then, they all hit the city for a black tie dinner, where honesty leads to tension, fallouts and walkouts.

programme.title: Rebel Wilson's Pooch Perfect
programme.desc: The top four remaining stylists battle for a place in the Grand Final. Drawing on their creative animal instincts, they must transform their pooches into a wild lion, bison, monkey or bear.
